EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - EOI Form Submit Confirmation
EmailTemplate.subject: Thank you, we've received your application
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
THE JOURNEY DOESN'T END HERE.
{!Contact.FirstName}, sometimes new opportunities present themselves when we least expect it. Here are a couple of really exciting contracts that we think would be a great match for you! If any of the roles tickles your interest, head over to Allience Connect to proceed with an application.
[Link to the private jobs board in the app]
[Link to job ad 1] [Link to job ad 2] [Link to job ad 3]
Meanwhile, if you have any questions at all you can always call our friendly staff on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
